data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific pricing (downtown premium)', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case mentions a 10% higher price downtown, there is no evidence of actual pricing data or API responses that demonstrate this pricing structure. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to validate this requirement.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm location-specific pricing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
